cards.back: The process of enabling computers to interpret and understand visual information from images and videos

cards.front: What is the focus of Chap-3 (3.1)?

cards.back: An image that represents the amount of light reflected or emitted by an object, capturing its intensity

cards.front: What is the main goal of computer vision?
cards.back: To enable computers to interpret and understand visual information from images and videos
The process of converting light into an electrical signal, creating an image
